allow: Bash(node -e "const b=require\('./data/07_research/references-bibliography.json'\); const r=b.references; console.log\('total',r.length\); console.log\('missing apa7:', r.filter\(x=>!x.apa7\).map\(x=>x.citation_id\)\); console.log\('missing citation_id:', r.filter\(x=>!x.citation_id\).length\);")
